steps.title: Set up the dimensions
steps.content: Width is $w$ feet. The length is $12$ times the width, so length $=12w$ feet. Area $=$ length $\times$ width gives $$y=(12w)(w).$$

steps.title: Interpret the factor
steps.content: In $(12w)(w)$, the factor $w$ is the width, so $(12w)$ must be the length. This matches choice A, so A is correct.
